primary_meaning: a fact or event that can be observed and studied
usage_notes: Use with 'phenomenon of', 'natural phenomenon', 'social phenomenon', 'rare phenomenon', 'common phenomenon'
common_collocations: natural phenomenon, social phenomenon, common phenomenon, rare phenomenon, phenomenon occurs
image_search_query: natural phenomenon like aurora borealis or rainbow across sky
image_context: A natural event like lightning, aurora borealis, or a rainbow representing an observable phenomenon
example_1: The northern lights are a spectacular natural phenomenon.
example_1_translation: A aurora boreal é um espetáculo fenómeno natural.
example_2: Social media has become a cultural phenomenon affecting all generations.
example_2_translation: As redes sociais tornaram-se um fenómeno cultural que afecta todas as gerações.
example_3: Scientists studied the phenomenon of climate change for decades.
example_3_translation: Os cientistas estudaram o fenómeno das alterações climáticas durante décadas.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: phe-NOM-e-non. Emphasize second: phe-NOM-e-non. Plural: phe-NOM-e-na

primary_meaning: a condition or fact that affects a situation
usage_notes: Use with 'circumstance of', 'under the circumstances', 'due to circumstances', 'extenuating circumstances', 'living circumstances'
common_collocations: under the circumstances, due to circumstances, extenuating circumstances, living circumstances, special circumstances
image_search_query: puzzle pieces coming together or person in their environment representing circumstances
image_context: A person surrounded by various elements or puzzle pieces fitting together, representing conditions
example_1: Under the circumstances, she handled the situation remarkably well.
example_1_translation: Nas circunstâncias, ela lidou com a situação de forma notável.
example_2: Financial circumstances forced him to delay his studies.
example_2_translation: Circunstâncias financeiras forçaram-no a adiar os estudos.
example_3: The police will consider all circumstances before making a decision.
example_3_translation: A polícia considerará todas as circunstâncias antes de tomar uma decisão.
pronunciation_tips: Three syllables: CIR-cum-stance. Emphasize first: CIR-cum-stance

primary_meaning: the process of putting a plan into action
usage_notes: Use with 'implementation of', 'policy implementation', 'implementation process', 'successful implementation', 'implementation phase'
common_collocations: policy implementation, successful implementation, implementation process, implementation plan, implementation phase
image_search_query: gears and machinery in motion representing implementation process
image_context: Gears clicking into place or machinery in motion, representing a plan being put into action
example_1: The implementation of the new policy will begin next month.
example_1_translation: A implementação da nova política começará no próximo mês.
example_2: Successful implementation requires careful planning and coordination.
example_2_translation: Uma implementação bem-sucedida requer planeamento e coordenação cuidadosos.
example_3: The company oversaw the implementation of the new software system.
example_3_translation: A empresa supervisionou a implementação do novo sistema de software.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: im-ple-men-TA-tion. Emphasize fourth: im-ple-men-TA-tion

primary_meaning: the act of using something
usage_notes: Use with 'utilization of', 'resource utilization', 'maximum utilization', 'utilization rate', 'efficient utilization'
common_collocations: resource utilization, maximum utilization, efficient utilization, utilization rate, utilization of resources
image_search_query: person using tools efficiently or resources being used productively
image_context: Tools or resources being used effectively, or a meter showing high utilization levels
example_1: The efficient utilization of resources is essential for profitability.
example_1_translation: A utilização eficiente dos recursos é essencial para a rentabilidade.
example_2: The system tracks the utilization of office space throughout the day.
example_2_translation: O sistema rastreia a utilização do espaço de escritório ao longo do dia.
example_3: We need to improve our utilization of available technology.
example_3_translation: Precisamos melhorar a nossa utilização da tecnologia disponível.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: u-ti-li-ZA-tion. Emphasize third: u-ti-li-ZA-tion

primary_meaning: a detailed description of requirements
usage_notes: Use with 'specification of', 'technical specification', 'product specification', 'meet specifications', 'design specifications'
common_collocations: technical specification, product specification, meet specifications, design specifications, specification requirements
image_search_query: blueprint or technical document with detailed measurements and requirements
image_context: A blueprint, technical drawing, or detailed document showing specific measurements and requirements
example_1: The technical specifications for the device are listed on our website.
example_1_translation: As especificações técnicas do dispositivo estão listadas no nosso site.
example_2: Please review the project specifications before beginning work.
example_2_translation: Por favor, revise as especificações do projeto antes de começar a trabalhar.
example_3: The product does not meet the required safety specifications.
example_3_translation: O produto não atende às especificações de segurança exigidas.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: spec-i-fi-CA-tion. Emphasize fourth: spec-i-fi-CA-tion

primary_meaning: documents that provide official information
secondary_meaning: the act of recording information in documents
usage_notes: Use with 'documentation of', 'technical documentation', 'project documentation', 'provide documentation', 'supporting documentation'
common_collocations: technical documentation, project documentation, provide documentation, supporting documentation, documentation requirements
image_search_query: stack of organized official documents or files representing documentation
image_context: A well-organized stack of official documents, certificates, or files in a filing system
example_1: Please submit all required documentation with your application.
example_1_translation: Por favor, apresente toda a documentação necessária com a sua candidatura.
example_2: The software includes comprehensive technical documentation.
example_2_translation: O software inclui documentação técnica abrangente.
example_3: Proper documentation is essential for audit purposes.
example_3_translation: A documentação adequada é essencial para fins de auditoria.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: doc-u-men-TA-tion. Emphasize third: doc-u-men-TA-tion

primary_meaning: the act of checking that something is true or correct
secondary_meaning: proof or evidence that confirms something
usage_notes: Use with 'verification of', 'identity verification', 'require verification', 'verification process', 'email verification'
common_collocations: identity verification, require verification, verification process, email verification, verification code
image_search_query: checkmark or magnifying glass over document representing verification
image_context: A checkmark on a document, or a magnifying glass examining evidence, representing confirmation
example_1: Identity verification is required before accessing the account.
example_1_translation: A verificação de identidade é necessária antes de aceder à conta.
example_2: The verification process takes approximately 24 hours.
example_2_translation: O processo de verificação leva aproximadamente 24 horas.
example_3: Please provide verification of your current address.
example_3_translation: Por favor, forneça verificação do seu endereço atual.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: ver-i-fi-CA-tion. Emphasize third: ver-i-fi-CA-tion

primary_meaning: the act of checking or proving that something is valid
secondary_meaning: recognition or acceptance of something as true
usage_notes: Use with 'validation of', 'data validation', 'require validation', 'validation process', 'validation check'
common_collocations: data validation, require validation, validation process, validation check, validation criteria
image_search_query: stamp of approval on document or checkbox representing validation
image_context: An official stamp or seal of approval on documents, or a form with validation checkmarks
example_1: The data validation process identified several errors in the report.
example_1_translation: O processo de validação de dados identificou vários erros no relatório.
example_2: Users must complete email validation to activate their accounts.
example_2_translation: Os utilizadores devem concluir a validação de email para ativar as suas contas.
example_3: The validation of results is essential before publishing.
example_3_translation: A validação dos resultados é essencial antes da publicação.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: val-i-DA-tion. Emphasize third: val-i-DA-tion

primary_meaning: official confirmation that something meets standards
usage_notes: Use with 'certification of', 'professional certification', 'quality certification', 'obtain certification', 'certification program'
common_collocations: professional certification, quality certification, obtain certification, certification program, certification requirements
image_search_query: official certificate with seal or badge representing certification
image_context: An official certificate with a seal, badge, or diploma representing professional certification
example_1: She earned her professional certification in project management.
example_1_translation: Ela obteve a sua certificação profissional em gestão de projetos.
example_2: The company has ISO quality certification.
example_2_translation: A empresa tem certificação de qualidade ISO.
example_3: Certification programs are available for various skill levels.
example_3_translation: Programas de certificação estão disponíveis para vários níveis de competência.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: cer-ti-fi-CA-tion. Emphasize third: cer-ti-fi-CA-tion

primary_meaning: official permission or power to do something
usage_notes: Use with 'authorization for', 'written authorization', 'require authorization', 'grant authorization', 'prior authorization'
common_collocations: written authorization, require authorization, grant authorization, prior authorization, authorization required
image_search_query: signature on official document or stamp of approval representing authorization
image_context: A signature on an official document, or an authorization stamp with checkmark
example_1: You need written authorization from your supervisor to proceed.
example_1_translation: Precisa de autorização por escrito do seu supervisor para prosseguir.
example_2: The transaction was declined due to lack of authorization.
example_2_translation: A transação foi recusada por falta de autorização.
example_3: Prior authorization is required for specialized treatments.
example_3_translation: Autorização prévia é necessária para tratamentos especializados.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: au-thor-i-ZA-tion. Emphasize third: au-thor-i-ZA-tion

primary_meaning: an official announcement or warning
usage_notes: Use with 'notification of', 'send notification', 'receive notification', 'email notification', 'push notification'
common_collocations: send notification, receive notification, email notification, push notification, notification system
image_search_query: notification bell or envelope icon representing notification
image_context: A notification bell, envelope icon, or alert popup on a screen
example_1: You will receive email notification once your application is processed.
example_1_translation: Receberá notificação por email assim que a sua candidatura for processada.
example_2: The notification system alerts users to important updates.
example_2_translation: O sistema de notificação alerta os utilizadores sobre atualizações importantes.
example_3: Please disable push notifications if you find them distracting.
example_3_translation: Por favor, desative as notificações push se as achar distrativas.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: no-ti-fi-CA-tion. Emphasize third: no-ti-fi-CA-tion

primary_meaning: the act of sharing or exchanging information
usage_notes: Use with 'communication with', 'means of communication', 'effective communication', 'communication skills', 'open communication'
common_collocations: effective communication, communication skills, open communication, means of communication, communication channel
image_search_query: two people talking or speech bubbles representing communication
image_context: Two people in conversation, speech bubbles, or connected communication devices
example_1: Effective communication is essential for successful teamwork.
example_1_translation: A comunicação eficaz é essencial para o sucesso do trabalho em equipa.
example_2: The company has improved its internal communication systems.
example_2_translation: A empresa melhorou os seus sistemas de comunicação interna.
example_3: Communication skills are valued in all professional environments.
example_3_translation: As competências de comunicação são valorizadas em todos os ambientes profissionais.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: com-mu-ni-CA-tion. Emphasize third: com-mu-ni-CA-tion

primary_meaning: the act of working together for a common goal
usage_notes: Use with 'cooperation with', 'international cooperation', 'mutual cooperation', 'require cooperation', 'show cooperation'
common_collocations: international cooperation, mutual cooperation, require cooperation, show cooperation, cooperation between
image_search_query: people working together on a project or hands joining representing cooperation
image_context: Hands coming together or people working side by side on a shared project
example_1: International cooperation is essential to address climate change.
example_1_translation: A cooperação internacional é essencial para enfrentar as alterações climáticas.
example_2: The project succeeded thanks to the cooperation of all team members.
example_2_translation: O projeto teve sucesso graças à cooperação de todos os membros da equipa.
example_3: We appreciate your cooperation in completing this survey.
example_3_translation: Agradecemos a sua cooperação em completar este questionário.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: co-op-er-A-tion. Emphasize third: co-op-er-A-tion

primary_meaning: the act of working together on a project
usage_notes: Use with 'collaboration with', 'international collaboration', 'artistic collaboration', 'collaboration between', 'research collaboration'
common_collocations: international collaboration, artistic collaboration, research collaboration, collaboration project, collaboration tools
image_search_query: multiple artists or scientists working together on shared creation
image_context: Multiple professionals working together on a shared creation or research project
example_1: The album was a remarkable collaboration between three famous artists.
example_1_translation: O álbum foi uma colaboração notável entre três artistas famosos.
example_2: International collaboration is key to scientific advancement.
example_2_translation: A colaboração internacional é fundamental para o avanço científico.
example_3: The company values collaboration over individual achievement.
example_3_translation: A empresa valoriza a colaboração mais do que a conquista individual.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: col-lab-o-RA-tion. Emphasize third: col-lab-o-RA-tion

primary_meaning: the act of organizing things so they work together
secondary_meaning: the ability to move body parts smoothly
usage_notes: Use with 'coordination of', 'lack of coordination', 'team coordination', 'coordination between', 'effective coordination'
common_collocations: team coordination, lack of coordination, effective coordination, coordination meeting, coordination of efforts
image_search_query: gears meshing together or conductor leading orchestra representing coordination
image_context: Gears meshing together in perfect alignment, or a conductor leading musicians in coordinated harmony
example_1: The event required careful coordination between multiple agencies.
example_1_translation: O evento exigiu coordenação cuidadosa entre múltiplas agências.
example_2: Good hand-eye coordination is important for playing tennis.
example_2_translation: Boa coordenação olho-mão é importante para jogar ténis.
example_3: The project suffered from poor coordination of resources.
example_3_translation: O projeto sofreu com a má coordenação de recursos.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: co-or-di-NA-tion. Emphasize third: co-or-di-NA-tion

primary_meaning: a detailed study or examination
usage_notes: Use with 'investigation of', 'conduct an investigation', 'under investigation', 'federal investigation', 'investigation reveals'
common_collocations: conduct an investigation, under investigation, federal investigation, criminal investigation, investigation reveals
image_search_query: detective with magnifying glass or forensic team examining evidence
image_context: A detective with magnifying glass, or forensic team carefully examining evidence at a crime scene
example_1: The police have launched a formal investigation into the incident.
example_1_translation: A polícia iniciou uma investigação formal sobre o incidente.
example_2: The investigation revealed several financial irregularities.
example_2_translation: A investigação revelou várias irregularidades financeiras.
example_3: She is currently under investigation for suspected fraud.
example_3_translation: Ela está atualmente sob investigação por suspeita de fraude.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: in-ves-ti-GA-tion. Emphasize third: in-ves-ti-GA-tion

primary_meaning: a detailed inspection or test
usage_notes: Use with 'examination of', 'under examination', 'medical examination', 'pass an examination', 'final examination'
common_collocations: medical examination, pass an examination, under examination, final examination, comprehensive examination
image_search_query: student taking test or doctor examining patient representing examination
image_context: A student taking a formal test, or a doctor conducting a medical examination of a patient
example_1: Students must pass a final examination to graduate.
example_1_translation: Os alunos devem passar num exame final para obter o diploma.
example_2: The medical examination revealed no underlying health issues.
example_2_translation: O exame médico não revelou problemas de saúde subjacentes.
example_3: The matter is still under examination by the committee.
example_3_translation: O assunto ainda está sob análise pelo comitê.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: ex-am-i-NA-tion. Emphasize third: ex-am-i-NA-tion

primary_meaning: an evaluation or estimate of something
usage_notes: Use with 'assessment of', 'risk assessment', 'make an assessment', 'needs assessment', 'performance assessment'
common_collocations: risk assessment, needs assessment, performance assessment, make an assessment, assessment criteria
image_search_query: checklist or evaluation form with ratings representing assessment
image_context: A checklist with ratings, or a clipboard with evaluation criteria being checked off
example_1: The risk assessment identified several potential hazards.
example_1_translation: A avaliação de riscos identificou vários perigos potenciais.
example_2: Teachers conduct regular assessments to track student progress.
example_2_translation: Os professores realizam avaliações regulares para acompanhar o progresso dos alunos.
example_3: We need a fair assessment of the company's current situation.
example_3_translation: Precisamos de uma avaliação justa da situação atual da empresa.
pronunciation_tips: Three syllables: as-SESS-ment. Emphasize second: as-SESS-ment

primary_meaning: a detailed examination of something
secondary_meaning: the process of breaking something into parts to understand it
usage_notes: Use with 'analysis of', 'conduct an analysis', 'data analysis', 'statistical analysis', 'in-depth analysis'
common_collocations: data analysis, statistical analysis, in-depth analysis, conduct an analysis, critical analysis
image_search_query: chart with graph or scientist examining data on computer
image_context: A scientist examining data charts, or puzzle pieces being analyzed to understand the whole picture
example_1: The data analysis revealed a significant trend in sales.
example_1_translation: A análise de dados revelou uma tendência significativa nas vendas.
example_2: Her analysis of the poem focused on its use of imagery.
example_2_translation: A sua análise do poema focou-se no uso de imagens.
example_3: Analysts are conducting a thorough analysis of market conditions.
example_3_translation: Os analistas estão a realizar uma análise aprofundada das condições do mercado.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: a-NAL-y-sis. Emphasize second: a-NAL-y-sis. Plural: a-NAL-y-sees

primary_meaning: the act of explaining the meaning of something
secondary_meaning: a particular way of understanding something
usage_notes: Use with 'interpretation of', 'open to interpretation', 'artistic interpretation', 'data interpretation', 'different interpretations'
common_collocations: open to interpretation, artistic interpretation, data interpretation, different interpretations, legal interpretation
image_search_query: person reading ancient text or musician interpreting musical score
image_context: A person carefully reading and explaining a text, or a musician interpreting a musical score
example_1: The interpretation of the ancient text required expertise in historical context.
example_1_translation: A interpretação do texto antigo requeriu conhecimento do contexto histórico.
example_2: Artistic interpretation varies significantly between performers.
example_2_translation: A interpretação artística varia significativamente entre os intérpretes.
example_3: The contract's interpretation is subject to legal dispute.
example_3_translation: A interpretação do contrato está sujeita a disputa legal.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: in-ter-pre-TA-tion. Emphasize third: in-ter-pre-TA-tion

primary_meaning: a statement that makes something clear
secondary_meaning: a reason or justification for something
usage_notes: Use with 'explanation for', 'provide an explanation', 'scientific explanation', 'demand an explanation', 'satisfactory explanation'
common_collocations: provide an explanation, scientific explanation, demand an explanation, satisfactory explanation, clear explanation
image_search_query: teacher pointing to diagram or person presenting information clearly
image_context: A teacher explaining a concept with a diagram, or someone presenting information in a clear, organized way
example_1: Can you provide a clear explanation of the process?
example_1_translation: Pode fornecer uma explicação clara do processo?
example_2: The scientist gave a detailed explanation of the findings.
example_2_translation: O cientista deu uma explicação detalhada das descobertas.
example_3: He demanded an explanation for the unexpected charges.
example_3_translation: Ele exigiu uma explicação para as cobranças inesperadas.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: ex-pla-NA-tion. Emphasize third: ex-pla-NA-tion

primary_meaning: the importance or meaning of something
usage_notes: Use with 'significance of', 'historical significance', 'great significance', 'understand the significance', 'statistical significance'
common_collocations: historical significance, great significance, understand the significance, statistical significance, cultural significance
image_search_query: important milestone or golden star representing significance
image_context: A golden star, important milestone marker, or emphasized text showing something of great significance
example_1: The discovery has great historical significance for the region.
example_1_translation: A descoberta tem grande significado histórico para a região.
example_2: Students should understand the significance of proper citation.
example_2_translation: Os alunos devem compreender a importância da citação adequada.
example_3: The results are statistically significant, not due to chance.
example_3_translation: Os resultados são estatisticamente significativos, não devidos ao acaso.
pronunciation_tips: Four syllables: sig-NI-fi-cance. Emphasize second: sig-NI-fi-cance

primary_meaning: the ability to continue without causing harm to the environment
secondary_meaning: the ability to continue over time
usage_notes: Use with 'sustainability of', 'environmental sustainability', 'economic sustainability', 'promote sustainability', 'sustainability initiatives'
common_collocations: environmental sustainability, economic sustainability, promote sustainability, sustainability initiatives, sustainability goals
image_search_query: green leaves and recycling symbols or solar panels representing sustainability
image_context: Green leaves, recycling symbols, or renewable energy sources representing sustainable practices
example_1: The company is committed to environmental sustainability.
example_1_translation: A empresa está comprometida com a sustentabilidade ambiental.
example_2: Sustainability initiatives have reduced energy consumption by 30%.
example_2_translation: Iniciativas de sustentabilidade reduziram o consumo de energia em 30%.
example_3: Economic sustainability requires balancing growth with resource conservation.
example_3_translation: A sustentabilidade económica requer equilibrar o crescimento com a conservação de recursos.
pronunciation_tips: Six syllables: sus-tain-a-BIL-i-ty. Emphasize fourth: sus-tain-a-BIL-i-ty

primary_meaning: the responsibility to explain or justify actions
usage_notes: Use with 'accountability for', 'lack of accountability', 'promote accountability', 'corporate accountability', 'accountability measures'
common_collocations: lack of accountability, promote accountability, corporate accountability, accountability measures, accountability framework
image_search_query: person giving account to an audience or report with checkmarks representing accountability
image_context: A person presenting a report to an audience, or a document with accountability checkmarks
example_1: The new policy increases accountability for company executives.
example_1_translation: A nova política aumenta a responsabilização dos executivos da empresa.
example_2: Lack of accountability can lead to abuse of power.
example_2_translation: A falta de responsabilização pode levar ao abuso de poder.
example_3: The organization promotes transparency and accountability in governance.
example_3_translation: A organização promove a transparência e a responsabilização na governança.
pronunciation_tips: Five syllables: ac-count-a-BIL-i-ty. Emphasize third: ac-count-a-BIL-i-ty
memory_hook: Ac-count-a-BIL-i-ty - 'accountable' + 'ity' - being able to give account

primary_meaning: the quality of being open and honest
secondary_meaning: the quality of being clear and easy to understand
usage_notes: Use with 'transparency in', 'lack of transparency', 'promote transparency', 'government transparency', 'transparency of process'
common_collocations: lack of transparency, promote transparency, government transparency, transparency of process, financial transparency
image_search_query: clear glass window or open book representing transparency
image_context: Clear glass allowing full visibility, or an open book showing all information clearly
example_1: The government has promised greater transparency in decision-making.
example_1_translation: O governo prometeu maior transparência na tomada de decisões.
example_2: Transparency in financial reporting is essential for investor trust.
example_2_translation: A transparência nos relatórios financeiros é essencial para a confiança dos investidores.
example_3: The transparent process allowed stakeholders to see exactly how funds were used.
example_3_translation: O processo transparente permitiu que as partes interessadas vissem exatamente como os fundos foram utilizados.
pronunciation_tips: Three syllables: tran-SPARE-en-cy. Emphasize first: tran-SPARE-en-cy
memory_hook: Tran-spare-ncy - like clear glass that you can see through
